description: Damaged legal document written by Halfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (1100–38). Regarding manufacture of wine between [...] b. Yeshuʿa al-ʿAkkāwı known as Ibn Bunān (appears also in T-S 10J8.6 (PGPID 3071)), Abū Saʿd Natan b. Yosef and Ṣedaqa. Also a certain Manṣūr is mentioned. The date seems to be Elul 1438 Seleucid =1127 CE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
